en: ' A Genius defined, ' Genius of the good eye,' by opposition to ' the bad eye.' Saoka (Sdk) is an auxiliary to Mithra (Mihr); she receives first, from above, all the good destined to man, and transmits it to the lower sky or firmament (which is the seat of Destiny) through the moon and Ardvtsfir (Gr.
